name: list
_note: tournaments.list returns the caller's status/format-filtered archive plus per-status counts. Empty STATE (fresh user) → ok:true with tournaments:[] and a zeroed counts map — NEVER no_db (this is a pure in-memory lens, no DB dependency). An unknown status/format filter is ignored (no throw), so the call still succeeds. Per-user isolated: one user never sees another's tournaments.
